title: Self-echo relayed under the agent's profile name (an alias)
predicted_basis: live failure class 2026-07-08: the agent's own posts come back through the relay attributed to its display/profile name, not its configured id, and triggered wakes; with the name in agent.aliases the echo is self-caused
failure_mode: the agent replies to its own relayed status line (author 'Aether' does not match agent id 'vigil'), feeding a self-amplification loop
invariant: an author matching an identity in the agent's bundle is EVIDENCE the message may be the agent's own relay — never proof; here the surrounding context (a status line, no bid, nothing to add) independently warrants no visible turn
rationale: The trigger is this agent's own completion report, attributed by the relay to its profile name. The deterministic self-echo short-circuit was removed 2026-07-10: author name-equality and text-equality do not mechanically prove self-causation (review finding — a human repeating the agent's words, or sharing its display name, minted PASS 1.0 with no model). Ground truth stays PASS, model-scored, until the message contract carries an adapter-asserted runtime identity (schema-v2).
